steps.title: Name the three integers
steps.content: Let the consecutive integers be $n$, $n+1$, and $n+2$. The greatest is $n+2$.

steps.title: Translate the condition
steps.content:
Subtract the greatest integer from the sum of the other two integers.
$$n+(n+1)-(n+2)=63$$

steps.title: Identify the greatest integer
steps.content:
Simplify the equation, then add $2$ to get the greatest integer.
$$n+n+1-n-2=63$$
$$n-1=63$$
$$n=64$$
$$n+2=66$$
The answer is 66.
